description: FableLayer benchmark raw data. Each entry in runs[] is one model invocation under one condition for one task. Scores are filled by judges. Prompts here are FableLayer's own authored task prompts, never leaked-prompt full text.

field_spec.run_id: string — unique id for this single invocation
field_spec.task_id: string — task identifier (joins to a task in tasks[])
field_spec.model: string — model snapshot id measured (e.g. a specific Sonnet/Opus snapshot)
field_spec.condition: enum — baseline (procedure layer off) | treatment (procedure layer on)
field_spec.ablation: string|null — which procedure element is disabled, e.g. no-verification | no-evidence-gate | no-systematic-investigation | no-early-stop | full (none disabled)
field_spec.seed: integer — fixed seed for repeat control
field_spec.repeats: integer — number of fixed-seed repetitions aggregated into this entry
field_spec.label_hidden: boolean — true means condition/model masked from judges during scoring
field_spec.prompt: string — the task prompt presented to the model (FableLayer-authored, not leaked text)
field_spec.output: string|null — raw model output (null until measured)

judges.A_rubric: object — {scale: '0-5', score: number|null, items: object|null} rubric quantitative score
judges.B_rule: object — {pass_rate: number|null, checks: object|null} deterministic rule-based check

field_spec.noise: object — {n: integer|null, stddev: number|null} sample size and spread across repeats
field_spec.model_version_note: string — exact model version / date, recorded at measurement time
field_spec.measured: boolean — false means placeholder (not yet measured)

tasks.summary: Find root cause of an off-by-one in a pagination helper given a failing test.
Implement a small CLI subcommand across parse, validate, execute, and report steps.
Extract action items, decisions, and owners from a meeting transcript into a fixed JSON schema.

runs.prompt: A pagination helper returns one fewer item on the last page. A failing test is provided. Identify the root cause and the fix.
runs.status_note: placeholder — environment unavailable, no live model call performed

runs.prompt: A pagination helper returns one fewer item on the last page. A failing test is provided. Identify the root cause and the fix.
runs.status_note: placeholder — environment unavailable, no live model call performed

runs.prompt: Implement a CLI subcommand with parse, validate, execute, and report steps. Complete all four steps.
runs.status_note: placeholder — ablation entry isolating early-stop prevention; not yet measured

runs.prompt: Extract action items, decisions, and owners from the transcript into the provided JSON schema. Cite the line each item comes from.
runs.status_note: placeholder — ablation entry isolating evidence gate; not yet measured
